patterns.name: Left Text Safe
patterns.description: Subject positioned on the right to leave clean space on the left.
patterns.prompt_injection: Subject positioned to the right third, extensive clean negative space on the left side to accommodate headline, subheadline and call-to-action without interfering with the subject.

patterns.name: Bottom Center Safe
patterns.description: Subject centered but elevated to leave text space at the bottom.
patterns.prompt_injection: Subject centered and slightly elevated in frame, smooth gradient drop-off towards the bottom creating an unobstructed dark area for bold centered typography.

patterns.name: Right Text Safe
patterns.prompt_injection: Subject positioned to the left third, vast clean negative space stretching across the right side, perfect for marketing copy overlay.
